notes: Gold set for retrieval + filter-extraction eval. expected_rids are ANY-OF unless required_rids is present (ALL required, for comparisons).

cases.query: What is the AIM-120 AMRAAM?
cases.notes: Formal designation lookup. AIM-120_AMRAAM.json, modelID 2006, nomenclature 'AIM-120 AMRAAM'.

cases.query: Tell me about the T-90 tank.
cases.notes: Formal designation lookup. T-90.json, modelID 2056, nomenclature 'T-90', systemType Main Battle Tank.

cases.query: What is the F-16 Fighting Falcon?
cases.notes: Formal/popular name lookup (query omits manufacturer 'General Dynamics'). General_Dynamics_F-16_Fighting_Falcon.json, modelID 2025.

cases.query: Tell me about the F-22 Raptor.
cases.notes: Formal designation + popular nickname 'Raptor'. Lockheed_Martin_F-22_Raptor.json, modelID 2030.

cases.query: Tell me about the Abrams tank.
cases.notes: Partial name lookup, omits 'M1'. M1_Abrams.json, modelID 2033, nomenclature 'M1 Abrams'.

cases.query: Tell me about the Sidewinder missile.
cases.notes: Popular name lookup, omits 'AIM-9'. AIM-9_Sidewinder.json, modelID 2008.

cases.query: What is the Eurofighter Typhoon?
cases.notes: Formal designation lookup. Eurofighter_Typhoon.json, modelID 2021, systemType Fighter Aircraft.

cases.query: What is the Humvee?
cases.notes: Popular-name lookup. Humvee.json, modelID 2026, systemType Utility Vehicle.

cases.query: Tell me about the S-400 missile system.
cases.notes: Formal designation lookup. S-400_missile_system.json, modelID 2049, systemType Surface-to-Air Missile.

cases.query: What is the range of the AIM-120 AMRAAM?
cases.notes: AIM-120_AMRAAM.json parametrics: Range parameterValue '75', uom 'km' (baseline AIM-120A/B variant).

cases.query: How heavy is the M1 Abrams?
cases.notes: M1_Abrams.json parametrics: Mass parameterValue '54000', uom 'kg'.

cases.query: What is the wingspan of the F-22 Raptor?
cases.notes: Lockheed_Martin_F-22_Raptor.json parametrics: Wingspan parameterValue '13.56', uom 'm'.

cases.query: What is the unit cost of the FIM-92 Stinger?
cases.notes: FIM-92_Stinger.json parametrics: Unit cost parameterValue '38000', uom 'USD'.

cases.query: How many F-35 Lightning IIs have been built?
cases.notes: Lockheed_Martin_F-35_Lightning_II.json parametrics: Number built parameterValue '1325', uom 'units'.

cases.query: What is the service ceiling of the Chengdu J-20?
cases.notes: Chengdu_J-20.json parametrics: Service ceiling parameterValue '20000', uom 'm'.

cases.query: Compare the F-22 Raptor and the F-35 Lightning II.
cases.notes: Requires both Lockheed_Martin_F-22_Raptor.json (2030) and Lockheed_Martin_F-35_Lightning_II.json (2031) in context to answer a comparison.

cases.query: Which is faster, the AIM-9 Sidewinder or the AIM-120 AMRAAM?
cases.notes: AIM-9_Sidewinder.json Maximum speed = 2.5 Mach (modelID 2008); AIM-120_AMRAAM.json Maximum speed = 4 Mach (modelID 2006). AMRAAM is faster.

cases.query: Compare the M1 Abrams and the T-90 main battle tanks.
cases.notes: Requires both M1_Abrams.json (2033) and T-90.json (2056) in context; both are systemType Main Battle Tank.

cases.query: Which has greater range, the Tomahawk missile or the BrahMos?
cases.notes: Tomahawk_missile.json Range = 2500 km (modelID 2059); BrahMos.json Range = 900 km (modelID 2018). Tomahawk has the greater range.

cases.query: Which air-to-air missiles have a range over 50 km?
cases.notes: All Air-to-Air Missile records and their Range: AIM-120 AMRAAM 75 km (2006), AIM-7 Sparrow 26 km (2007), AIM-9 Sidewinder 35.4 km (2008), R-60 8 km (2044), R-73 30 km (2045), R-77 80 km (2046). Only 2006 and 2046 exceed 50 km.

cases.query: What is the heaviest main battle tank in the corpus?
cases.notes: Main Battle Tank Mass values: Leopard 2 55200 kg (2029), M1 Abrams 54000 kg (2033), T-90 46000 kg (2056). Leopard 2 is heaviest.

cases.query: List US fighter aircraft in the database.
cases.notes: Fighter Aircraft records with Country of origin = 'United States': F/A-18E/F Super Hornet (2016), F-16 Fighting Falcon (2025), F-22 Raptor (2030), F-35 Lightning II (2031), F-15 Eagle (2039). Excludes Chengdu J-20 (China), Dassault Rafale (France), Eurofighter Typhoon (Multinational), Mikoyan MiG-29 (Soviet Union), Shenyang J-16 (China), Sukhoi Su-27/35/57 (Soviet Union/Russia), and TAI TF Kaan (no Country of origin parametric present).

cases.query: Which surface-to-air missile systems have a range of at least 100 km?
cases.notes: Surface-to-Air Missile Range values: FIM-92 Stinger has no Range parametric recorded (2023, data quirk), MIM-104 Patriot 160 km (2036), MIM-23 Hawk 50 km (2037, below threshold), S-400 400 km (2049). Only 2036 and 2049 qualify.

cases.query: Which fighter aircraft have a service ceiling above 19,000 meters?
cases.notes: Fighter Aircraft Service ceiling values above 19000 m: Chengdu J-20 20000 m (2019), F-22 Raptor 20000 m (2030), F-15 Eagle 20000 m (2039). Others are below the threshold (e.g. Su-27 18500 m, MiG-29 18000 m) or lack a Service ceiling parametric entirely (Eurofighter Typhoon, F-16 Fighting Falcon, Su-57, TAI TF Kaan).

cases.query: Which weapons in the corpus cost less than $50,000 per unit?
cases.notes: Among Weapon-group records with a Unit cost parametric, only FIM-92 Stinger ($38,000, modelID 2023) and M4 carbine ($700, modelID 2035) are under $50,000; all other priced weapons are six/seven figures (e.g. AIM-120 AMRAAM $1.095M, S-400 $500M). Several weapon records have no Unit cost parametric at all (GAU-8 Avenger, M2 Browning, Rheinmetall Rh-120, VA-111 Shkval) and are excluded rather than treated as matches.

cases.query: Why was the AIM-120 AMRAAM developed?
cases.notes: AIM-120_AMRAAM.json History description explains the ACEVAL/AIMVAL findings that Sparrow's need for continuous illumination let opposing Sidewinder-armed aircraft achieve mutual kills, driving a memorandum of agreement with European allies for the US to develop AMRAAM.

cases.query: How does the AIM-9 Sidewinder guide itself to a target?
cases.notes: AIM-9_Sidewinder.json Design description: 'The seeker tracks a difference in temperatures detected and uses proportional guidance to achieve impact', with later variants gaining all-aspect infrared tracking capability.

cases.query: How does the AGM-88 HARM find and attack its targets?
cases.notes: AGM-88_HARM.json Design description: proportional guidance system homes in on enemy radar emissions via a fixed antenna and seeker head in the missile's nose, propelled by a solid-propellant booster-sustainer rocket motor.

cases.query: What is the crew complement of the B-2 Spirit bomber?
cases.notes: No B-2 Spirit record exists in pages_schema (63 records span modelID 2001-2063; no B-2 file). Correct behavior is to state the information is not available in the corpus rather than fabricate an answer.

cases.query: What is the effective range of the Iron Dome air defense system?
cases.notes: No Iron Dome record exists in pages_schema. Correct behavior is to state the information is not available in the corpus rather than fabricate an answer or substitute a different SAM system (e.g. Patriot, S-400).
